items.name: Trailsinger Boots
items.description: Soft-soled boots traced with old road songs. They stretch a march and sharpen a scout's read of the road ahead.

items.name: Quarry Tally Rod
items.description: A brass counting rod used by frontier surveyors to squeeze one more cart from every shift.

items.name: Warcrest Pennon
items.description: A compact command pennon whose bright crest sharpens charges and keeps the line moving.

items.name: Bastion Gorget
items.description: Layered bronze plate forged for siege marshals. It steadies the front under punishing blows.
